":[{":[[ "slide_type"  ], "title"  ], "What are the Assumptions of Linear Regression?": {"bullets": [{"text": "Linearity: The relationship between the input variables and output variable is linear.", "source_id": "Page 13"}, {"text": "Independence: Each input variable is independent of the others.", "source_id": "Page 12"}], "key_message": "Linear regression assumes that the relationship between the input variables and output variable is linear and each input variable is independent of the others.", "visual_hint": "process", "image_id": "IMG_003"}}
